category.scope_note: LED luminaire and light source compliance comparison for Chinese manufacturers entering the Singapore market.

target_market_label.zh: 新加坡（EMA / 企业发展局）
target_market_label.zht: 新加坡（EMA / 企業發展局）

title.en: China-to-Singapore LED Luminaire Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国 LED 灯具进入新加坡：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國 LED 燈具進入新加坡：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China LED luminaire documentation against Singapore market requirements: the SAFETY Mark for Controlled Goods under Enterprise Singapore's Consumer Protection (Safety Requirements) Registration Scheme, SS/IEC 60598/62560/62471 safety standards, IMDA registration for wireless functions, and NEA energy labelling (MELS) and MEPS considerations for lamps, versus Chinese GB standards and CCC certification.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国 LED 灯具文件与新加坡市场要求差距对照：企业发展局《消费者保护（安全要求）注册计划》下用于受控货品的 SAFETY 安全标志、SS/IEC 60598/62560/62471 安全标准、无线功能的 IMDA 注册，以及灯具适用的 NEA 能效标签（MELS）与 MEPS 考量，并与中国 GB 标准及 CCC 认证对比。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國 LED 燈具文件與新加坡市場要求差距對照：企業發展局《消費者保護（安全要求）注冊計劃》下用於受控貨品的 SAFETY 安全標誌、SS/IEC 60598/62560/62471 安全標準、無線功能的 IMDA 注冊，以及燈具適用的 NEA 能效標籤（MELS）與 MEPS 考量，並與中國 GB 標準及 CCC 認證對比。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity assessment body determination, product safety determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, Registered Suppliers, and distributors should verify current Singapore law, Consumer Protection (Safety Requirements) Regulations, the controlled goods list, applicable SS/IEC standards, IMDA equipment registration requirements, and NEA energy labelling and MEPS obligations with qualified professionals before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构认定、产品安全认定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、注册供应商及经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士核验现行新加坡法律、《消费者保护（安全要求）条例》、受控货品清单、适用的 SS/IEC 标准、IMDA 设备注册要求，以及 NEA 能效标签及 MEPS 义务。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構認定、產品安全認定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、注冊供應商及經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行新加坡法律、《消費者保護（安全要求）條例》、受控貨品清單、適用的 SS/IEC 標準、IMDA 設備注冊要求，以及 NEA 能效標籤及 MEPS 義務。

answer_first.en: A Chinese LED luminaire or lamp manufacturer entering the Singapore market must determine whether the product is a Controlled Good under Enterprise Singapore's Consumer Protection (Safety Requirements) Registration Scheme (CPS) — directly-connected mains lamps and certain luminaires are in scope and require registration and the SAFETY Mark, held by a Singapore-incorporated Registered Supplier; demonstrate safety conformity to the applicable SS/IEC standards (SS/IEC 60598 for luminaires, IEC 62560 for self-ballasted lamps, IEC 62471 for photobiological safety) via a Conformity Assessment Body report; register any wireless function (e.g. Bluetooth/Wi-Fi smart lighting) with IMDA before supply; and address NEA energy considerations (the Mandatory Energy Labelling Scheme and Minimum Energy Performance Standards apply to in-scope lamps). Singapore has no horizontal RoHS directive, so restricted-substance control is product/standard-driven and electrical waste is handled through NEA's Extended Producer Responsibility (EPR) e-waste scheme — none of which is covered by existing Chinese CCC certification. Verify the current controlled goods list and scheme requirements before shipment.
answer_first.zh: 进入新加坡市场的中国 LED 灯具或灯泡制造商须：判定产品是否属于企业发展局《消费者保护（安全要求）注册计划》（CPS）下的受控货品——直接接入市电的灯泡及部分灯具属于适用范围，须进行注册并加贴 SAFETY 安全标志，注册由在新加坡注册成立的注册供应商持有；通过合格评定机构（CAB）报告，证明符合适用的 SS/IEC 标准（灯具 SS/IEC 60598、自镇流灯 IEC 62560、光生物安全 IEC 62471）；在供应前就任何无线功能（如蓝牙/Wi-Fi 智能照明）向 IMDA 注册；并应对 NEA 能效考量（强制能效标签计划 MELS 及最低能效标准 MEPS 适用于范围内灯具）。新加坡没有横向 RoHS 指令，因此限制物质控制由产品/标准驱动，电气废弃物通过 NEA 的生产者延伸责任（EPR）电子废弃物计划处理——上述均不被现有中国 CCC 认证所涵盖。请在出货前核查现行受控货品清单及计划要求。
answer_first.zht: 進入新加坡市場的中國 LED 燈具或燈泡製造商須：判定產品是否屬於企業發展局《消費者保護（安全要求）注冊計劃》（CPS）下的受控貨品——直接接入市電的燈泡及部分燈具屬於適用範圍，須進行注冊並加貼 SAFETY 安全標誌，注冊由在新加坡注冊成立的注冊供應商持有；通過合格評定機構（CAB）報告，證明符合適用的 SS/IEC 標準（燈具 SS/IEC 60598、自鎮流燈 IEC 62560、光生物安全 IEC 62471）；在供應前就任何無線功能（如藍牙/Wi-Fi 智能照明）向 IMDA 注冊；並應對 NEA 能效考量（強制能效標籤計劃 MELS 及最低能效標準 MEPS 適用於範圍內燈具）。新加坡沒有橫向 RoHS 指令，因此限制物質控制由產品/標準驅動，電氣廢棄物通過 NEA 的生產者延伸責任（EPR）電子廢棄物計劃處理——上述均不被現有中國 CCC 認證所涵蓋。請在出貨前核查現行受控貨品清單及計劃要求。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official Singapore regulator (Enterprise Singapore, IMDA, NEA), national standards body (SS via Enterprise Singapore), IEC standard reference, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs and non-official secondary sources are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true. The controlled goods list, applicable SS/IEC editions, NEA MEPS thresholds, and IMDA equipment registration categories must be re-verified against current official requirements on each review cycle.
